title: Damage = Border
description: Spawns all players in a world border that expands whenever someone takes damage.
body:
# 🎮 Damage = Border Plugin  

This plugin brings a **unique survival challenge** inspired by the German YouTuber **BastiGHG**! 🎥  

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/30bbyHLdevs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



## 🌍 How It Works  
Players spawn inside a **world border**, and every time someone **takes damage**, the border grows bigger – unlocking more of the world step by step.  

---

## ⚔️ Core Gameplay  

- ✅ **Automatic Border Spawn** → Always spawn safely inside the border.  
- ✅ **Growing Borders** → Every point of damage expands the border size.  
- ✅ **Multiplayer Support** → Border growth and stats work seamlessly on servers.  
- ✅ **Challenge Mode** → Damage becomes progress – unlock more of the world together!  

---

## 📊 Features  

- 📈 **Individual Stats** → Track your own border growth.  
- 🌐 **Server Stats** → See total damage from all players combined.  
- 🌀 **Teleportation Safety** → Players outside the border are sent back inside.  
- 💾 **Border Persistence** → Border size is saved across restarts.  
- ⛏️ **Block Protection** → No mining or breaking outside the border.  
- 🔢 **Odd-Number Support** → Border always aligns perfectly.  

---

## 📜 Commands  
- `/border | Show help menu | damageborder.admin |
- `/border reset | Reset borders to start size | damageborder.admin |
- `/border size <value> | Set specific border size | damageborder.admin |
- `/border info | Show border information | damageborder.admin |
- `/border center | Teleport to center | damageborder.admin |
- `/border damage | Show your damage stats | damageborder.admin |
- `/border totaldamage | Show total server stats | damageborder.admin |
- `/border togglemessages | Toggle expansion messages | damageborder.admin |
- `/border nether enable | Enable nether border | damageborder.admin |
- `/border nether disable | Disable nether border | damageborder.admin |
- `/border nether | Check nether status | damageborder.admin |
- `/border reload | Reload configuration | damageborder.admin |

---
